candidate_check.description: Site isolation for every site must be enabled.

check_content_excerpt:
The policy value for "Computer Configuration/Administrative Templates/Microsoft Edge/Enable site isolation for every site" must be set to "enabled".

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key:
HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Edge

If the value for "SitePerProcess" is not set to "REG_DWORD = 1", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for "Computer Configuration/Administrative Templates/Microsoft Edge/Enable site isolation for every site" to "enabled".
title: Site isolation for every site must be enabled.
